description_long: This is a large, multi-story research institute building with a rectangular footprint and a modernist architectural style. The facade is primarily composed of light brown brickwork, with horizontal bands of windows and a prominent central entrance. The roof features a combination of flat and slightly sloped metal sections, with solar panels visible on one side and a distinctive golden sculpture or device mounted atop a tower. The building is surrounded by landscaped greenery on two sides, and there is a paved area with marked parking spaces at the front. Notable exterior details include a mural on one side, rooftop HVAC units, and a variety of window shapes and sizes.
description: A modern, multi-story research institute with brick facades, a central tower topped by a golden sculpture, solar panels, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, parking spaces, and the building's name signage along the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mural, solar panels, and the tower with the golden sculpture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the building's back entrance, extensive windows, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tower, rooftop units, and a large expanse of greenery.
attribute_signage: Orange text signage reading 'RTT Building @ Belgium, Kortrijk.' is located at the base of the front facade, in a modern sans-serif font.
attribute_logo: A large golden sculpture resembling a stylized bird or abstract form is mounted atop the central tower, serving as a visual emblem.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is wide and centrally located, featuring double glass doors set within a recessed area. The entrance is accessible via a flat paved walkway with no visible steps, and is flanked by large windows and subtle decorative brickwork. There are no prominent decorative elements beyond the clean, modern lines.
